abilities.name: chlorophyll
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's Speed is doubled during strong sunlight. This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.
abilities.flavorText: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in harsh sunlight.

abilities.name: gluttony
abilities.shortEffect: Makes the Pokémon eat any held Berry triggered by low HP below 1/2 its max HP.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon eats any held Berry triggered by low HP when it falls below 50% of its HP, regardless of the Berry's usual threshold.
abilities.flavorText: If the Pokémon is holding a Berry to be eaten when its HP is low, it will instead eat the Berry when its HP drops to half or less.
